title: taraxacum pravum
intro: Taraxacum pravum, also known as the lesser dandelion or wild dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain inulin and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum pravum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy for urinary tract issues and skin conditions. Taraxacum pravum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used as a food ingredient in salads and other dishes.
